reviews.review_msg: Amy was a fairly average lecturer and only read off the slides. Often times exams asked you to expand on information in ways never talked about in lecture. She would also spend a considerable amount of class time talking about topics not even on the exam. Her course organization was also poor, so overall I would avoid unless necessary.

she is super nice and makes it feel like she really cares about how her students ae doing. class avg was pretty high. she gave extensions when needed. gave extra help all the time. makes an effort to learn everyone's name and feels very approachable

Dr. Lee is a good lecturer, but some of the material covered during the class felt dry or irrelevant. It was easy to tell what wouldn't be testable and yet the non-testable material seemed to always take up at least 50% of the 90 minute lectures. Exams were relatively straightforward. Dr. Lee badly needs a new TA though as the marking took FOREVER!

I had an amazing experience with Dr. Lee. All the examinable materials were on the lecture slides (no textbook) and the exams themselves were more than fair. Lectures felt like an open discussion rather than a blast of information. This class was a breath of fresh air. I highly recommend taking it with her, you will not regret it.
